title: mRNA Cancer Vaccine Just Doubled Melanoma Survival at 5 Years
script: 5-year trial results just confirmed: a personalized mRNA cancer vaccine nearly doubles melanoma survival rates. Moderna's experimental vaccine reads your tumor's unique mutations and builds a custom injection targeting up to 34 cancer fingerprints. In the trial, patients who got the vaccine plus Merck's Keytruda had a 92 percent 5-year survival rate. Those on Keytruda alone: 71 percent. A Phase 3 trial with 1,000 patients is underway. FDA approval is the next target.
